Off Calendar Aug-29-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Oct-21-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff and defendant. Case has mediated and settled. The OSC is re-set to 10/21/2003 at 10:00 AM in Department 212. CRC 225 Calenar. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton. (212)

Motion Requesting Exemption From Judicial Arbitration; Stipulation To Mediate In Lieu Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-25-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant's Motion Requesting Exemption from Judicial Arbitration, is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Jury Trial Date of 12/1/03 in Department 206 at 9:00 AM, is ordered set (with objection hearing set on 8/8/2003 at 10:30 AM in Department 212). A Mediation Order to Show Cause is ordered set on 8/27/2003 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and to give notice of the Mandatory Settlement Conference. Stipulation to Mediate in Lieu of Arbitration and Order has been signed. Counsel to submit a filing fee for stipulation and order. Proceedings reported by: Irene Burns. (212)
